name: Faki (Hellenic Lentil Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 plum tomatoes, fresh and juices OR 5 Italian type plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions: Wash lentils in a soup pot. Cover with 8 cups of cold water and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and let stand for an hour. Add onion, garlic, and celery; cover and simmer for 30 minutes. Stir in tomatoes, bay leaf, parsley, favorite herb, and half the olive oil. Simmer for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add enough water to return to 8 cups total. Discard bay leaf. Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot with vinegar and garnish with oregano.
